message:
🐛 fix: Use component directory as Docker build context (#63)

* refactor: use centralized spellcheck workflow and remove add-to-project

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 fix: Use component directory as Docker build context

The Docker build was using repo root as context but Dockerfiles
expect paths relative to component directory.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@kubestellar.io>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@kubestellar.io>

files.patch:
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Build image
         run: |
-          docker build -f ${{ matrix.component }}/Dockerfile -t local/${{ matrix.component }}:${{ github.sha }} .
+          docker build -t local/${{ matrix.component }}:${{ github.sha }} ${{ matrix.component }}
 
       - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
         uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.33.1
